title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tech Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tech Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Tech Mahindra in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
